# smartEngin Licence Client

> Build-free PHP library and REST API to license and auto-update your own WordPress
> plugin (or any software) through a smartEngin Licence & buy server. A licence key is
> a random server-stored token; enforcement is server-side; clients gate features
> fail-open on the last known status. Policy B+C: no updates without a valid key,
> premium features off but free core and data intact, never "dead without key".

## Docs

- [Integration guide](docs/integration-guide.md): step-by-step — register product, bundle library, one Self_Client instance, licence panel, gate features, updates.
- [REST reference](docs/rest-reference.md): endpoints /activate, /deactivate, /validate, /update, /download with parameters and responses.
- [OpenAPI spec](docs/openapi.yaml): machine-readable API for codegen and non-WordPress clients.
- [Windows software guide](docs/windows-software-guide.md): sell and silently auto-update Windows / non-WordPress apps (backend product with Platform=Windows, .NET reference client, single-file self-replace + restart, SHA-256 verify, code signing).
- [Python software guide](docs/python-software-guide.md): the same for Python desktop apps — dependency-free se_licence.py reference client, PyInstaller --onefile self-replace via --se-apply-update helper, SHA-256 verify, fail-open.
- [What licensing does](docs/what-licensing-does.md): honest scope (GPL reality, server-side enforcement, fail-open) plus a ready "give this to your AI" prompt.

## Reference clients (non-WordPress)

- [.NET/C# client](clients/dotnet/): SmartEngin.Licence library + sample app — activation, fail-open validation, single-file self-replace + restart. Guide: docs/windows-software-guide.md.
- [Python client](clients/python/): dependency-free se_licence.py — same recipe, PyInstaller --onefile self-update via --se-apply-update helper. Guide: docs/python-software-guide.md.

## Example

- [Reference plugin](example/smartengin-licence-example/): minimal working WordPress plugin with a licence panel, one gated premium feature, and the update hook.

## Library

- [Loader](self-client.php) and [class](includes/class-self-client.php): the Self_Client library itself.
